persona.goal: enquire about ayurvedic products for own joint pain and be called back

conversation.content: Hello, this is Saanvi calling from Kairali Ayurvedic Group. Is this a good time for a quick conversation?
Yes, go ahead
May I know your name please?
Rahul

English is fine
Got it. Could you please tell me what your enquiry is related to?

Is the product requirement for your own use, or is it for business purpose?
For my own use

I have joint pain
I'll arrange a callback from our expert team so they can guide you with the right details. Does that work for you?
Yes, that works
May I note an alternate contact number for you, Rahul ji?
That is nine-eight-seven-six-five-four-three-two-one-zero? And may I also have your email ID?
rahul@example.com
Could you also tell me which city you are calling from?
Delhi

I have noted your details — name Rahul, phone nine-eight-seven-six-five-four-three-two-one-zero, email rahul@example.com, city Delhi. Our team will be in touch with you shortly. Have a wonderful day, Rahul ji!
